description: CSRF middleware (`app/middleware/csrf.py`) is deployed live as of 2026-04-28 on commit 131aaee. Verified manually that POST /auth/logout and POST /skill-plans/create return 403 without X-CSRF-Token header, meta tag renders on /. Just need to run sec-toolkit /audit so the toolkit flips status from fix-in-progress to fixed.
title: Verify CSRF middleware finding closed (VVP-2026-004)
